prompt.body:
## Goal

Ship factory skill release **0.9.4** — the version cut that surfaces to plugin consumers the skill content merged since 0.9.3: #144 (the equal-rank reviewer pair), #156 (the scope-less supersession sweep fails loud), #173 (standalone task bodies inherit the design gates before promote — the 2026-07-13 ruling), #178 (every named stale fact corrected to the tree's present truth), and #186 (the shadow seat and the bench reach the shipped references). The content is already in the tree — this release is the bump that makes the installed plugin carry it. Release precedent: the 0.9.0 (#105) and 0.9.3 (#137) cuts — version-only bumps built by the pipeline.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL set version `0.9.4` in `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` and update the canonical current-version pin in `tests/test_plugin_packaging.py` — the single pin surface since #170 consolidated the seven per-file pins (this is the first release cut after that consolidation; the `0.9.3` literal appears twice there, the assert and its message) — and confirm by grep that no `0.9.3` version pin remains anywhere in the tree.
- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL keep the release scan green, and this release SHALL add no new router row and no new reference file — the one scan clause the standing tests cannot check, since `tests/test_skill_factory_router.py` iterates a static reference list; it is true for this window (the bench and shadow-seat content extended `references/pipeline.md` rather than adding a file). The rest of the scan is suite-enforced and rides the check gate: row↔file bijectivity, the SKILL.md line ceiling (72 at this filing), and the plugin↔SKILL description agreement (`tests/test_skill_factory_router.py`), and the consumer scan (`tests/test_check_model_refs.py`).
- [ ] THE SYSTEM SHALL pass the full suite green on this PR alone and leave every reference file, all templates, and all tools untouched — the only edits are `plugin.json` and the canonical pin test.

## Context & links

Content shipped by (the full `185c4e2..main` window on `skills/` + `templates/`, verified by diff at this filing, 2026-07-14):

- #144 (merged as `50f403b`) — `references/closing.md` +2/−1, `references/gates.md` ±2, `references/pipeline.md` ±6.
- #156 (merged as `24a0b93`) — `references/closing.md` ±2, `references/gates.md` ±2.
- #173 (merged as `38714e5`) — `references/closing.md` +9/−1: standalone tasks inherit the design gates before promote.
- #178 (merged as `d3b13b4`) — `references/closing.md` ±2, `references/onboarding.md` ±7, `templates/task.md` ±3, and the templates README deleted (−57).
- #186 (merged as `b84be92`) — `references/pipeline.md` +58: the shadow seat and the bench.

No other commit since the 0.9.3 cut touched `skills/` or `templates/`. `skills/factory/SKILL.md` is untouched in the window, so the router table carries no new or removed rows by construction.

- Precondition (implementer, before any edit): `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` at the build ref reads version `0.9.3` — the #137 cut, commit `185c4e2`; anything else → stop, Blocked, reporting the found version. This task builds only on top of the 0.9.3 release.
- The bump and the pin edit are one atomic implementation change (precedent: #105, #137); split, they fail `tests/test_plugin_version_pin_canonical.py` loud (the pin tracks plugin.json's current version).
- Non-goal: this PR ships the version to main; refreshing installed plugins on hosts is operational (/reload-plugins or a fresh session — the closing reference's session note) and outside this PR.
- Deliverable: the 0.9.4 bump across `.claude-plugin/plugin.json` plus the canonical pin in `tests/test_plugin_packaging.py`.

## Test expectations

Coverage already exists — every criterion is suite-enforced: the pin itself (`tests/test_plugin_packaging.py`), the bump↔pin coupling (`tests/test_plugin_version_pin_canonical.py`), router bijectivity, the SKILL.md line ceiling, and the description agreement (`tests/test_skill_factory_router.py`), and the consumer scan (`tests/test_check_model_refs.py`) — all riding the check gate. The tester verifies this coverage maps to the acceptance criteria and extends only on a real gap; note the canonical-pin suite structurally forbids a second positive version pin anywhere in tests/, so a no-op tester diff is a legal outcome here. Full suite green via `.venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/ -q`.

## Size

XS — two files, both mechanical.

held_out_tests.content:
"""Packaging guard for issue #51 — the plugin ships the manual, registers nothing.

The factory skill is distributed as a git-sourced plugin (the plugin is the whole
repo), so anything the *tracked tree* ships rides along to every consumer machine.
These tests guard the tracked tree (`git ls-files`), not the working filesystem:
`.gitignore` invites a legitimate untracked local `.mcp.json`, so a filesystem
existence check would fail on a dev machine while CI stayed green.
"""

import json
import pathlib
import subprocess

ROOT = pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def _tracked_files():
    out = subprocess.run(
        ["git", "-C", str(ROOT), "ls-files"],
        check=True, capture_output=True, text=True,
    )
    return out.stdout.splitlines()


def test_plugin_version_is_current():
    """The single canonical plugin-version pin (issue #149) — a plugin release
    edits this one assertion, not one per doc-test file."""
    data = json.loads((ROOT / ".claude-plugin" / "plugin.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    assert data["version"] == "0.9.4", \
        f".claude-plugin/plugin.json version is {data['version']!r}, expected '0.9.4'"


def test_repo_ships_no_mcp_json_at_root():
    tracked = _tracked_files()
    assert ".mcp.json" not in tracked


def test_no_tracked_mcp_json_anywhere():
    tracked = _tracked_files()
    mcp_files = [p for p in tracked if pathlib.PurePosixPath(p).name == ".mcp.json"]
    assert mcp_files == []


def test_plugin_manifest_registers_no_mcp_servers():
    tracked = _tracked_files()
    plugin_dir_files = [p for p in tracked if p.startswith(".claude-plugin/")]
    assert plugin_dir_files, "expected a tracked .claude-plugin/ manifest directory"

    for relpath in plugin_dir_files:
        path = ROOT / relpath
        if path.suffix != ".json":
            continue
        data = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        assert "mcpServers" not in data, f"{relpath} registers an MCP server"
        assert "mcp_servers" not in data, f"{relpath} registers an MCP server"


def test_plugin_manifest_has_no_mcp_config_file():
    tracked = _tracked_files()
    plugin_dir_files = [p for p in tracked if p.startswith(".claude-plugin/")]
    mcp_config_files = [p for p in plugin_dir_files if "mcp" in pathlib.PurePosixPath(p).name.lower()]
    assert mcp_config_files == []
